Directory structure
|-- README.md (this)
|-- _config.yml (overall configuration file for the website)
|-- index.html (the homepage)
|-- about-phd.md (the page that summarises my PhD)
|-- gsoc.md (the page with all the articles on GSoC2022)
|-- _includes (all the markup partials)
|   |-- footer.html
|   |-- head.html
|   |-- header.html
|-- _layouts (page markup templates)
|   |-- default.html
|   |-- page.html
|   |-- post.html
|-- _posts (all the blog posts)
|   |-- yyyy-mm-dd-title.html
|-- _sass (to be imported into main.scss to define the site style)
|   |-- _base.scss
|   |-- _layout.scss
|   |-- _syntax-highlighting.scss
|-- _site (this is where the generated site will be placed by default)
|-- css
|-- img (any pictures used)
|   |-- gsoc
|   |-- logo
|-- js (JavaScript code for site style)
